chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO. D-1831/2013 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority /hearing 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of Misc. 9160/2013 === 11.11.2015 None for petitioner. Syed Mohsin Imam, advocate. === Petitioner’s registration was put on red alert on the basis of certain objections which have been complied with yet the red- alert has not been withdrawn. Counsel for the petitioner is not present today. It appears that the matter might have been decided by the department. In case the department has not decided the matter finally, the objections of the petitioner shall be considered and a speaking order shall be passed. With these directions, this petition is disposed of. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE sharif 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO. D-1831/2013 Date Order with signature of Judge For katcha peshi For hearing of Misc. 9160/2013 === 01.09.2015 Mr. Muhammad Kokab Sabahuddin, Advocate. Mr. Ashfaq Hussain, Standing Counsel. === The counsel for the petitioner states that though the objection which compelled the respondent No.5 to put the petitioner’s registration on red alter has been complied with yet the red alert has not been withdrawn. Let the respondent No.5 explain this position. A responsible person shall be present in Court on the next date. To come up on 15.09.2015. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE sharif
